source: #### Implement Feature Flags
flat_retail_electricity_consumption_detail_gold = False
%run "DataHubBatchScripts/DEVELOPMENT_TOOLS/get_feature_flags"
#### Import python libraries

# - json: for encoding (serializing) Python objects to JSON and decoding (deserializing) JSON strings
# - logging: for logging events or errors within the application
# - sys: for accessing system-specific parameters and functions
# - Window: perform window operations on DataFrames
# - hash: for computing a hash value for specified columns
# - functions: for column operations and transformations
# - col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format: for column reference, string concatenation, literal values, timestamp conversion, current timestamp, and date formatting
# - sha2, concat_ws: for SHA-2 hashing and concatenating strings with a separator
# - types: for defining DataFrame schemas with structured fields and specific column types
# - datetime: for handling date and time operations
import json
import logging
import sys
from pyspark.sql import Window
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp, current_timestamp, date_format, to_date
from pyspark.sql.functions import hash, sha2, concat_ws, when, coalesce, regexp_extract, lower, row_number, regexp_replace
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType
from datetime import datetime
import com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics
from com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics.Constants import Constants
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.legacy.timeParserPolicy", "LEGACY")
#### Configure sql client connection

#Get Parameter from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
lake_db_name = "gold"
db_notebookname= "flat_retail_electricity_consumption_detail_gold"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"]
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"]
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"]

#Get Current Date
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Gold_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Gold_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']

#Synapse Dedicated Server detials
SynapseDedicatedServer = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedServer'] 
TempFolder = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['TempFolder']
SynapseDedicatedDatabase = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedDatabase']
#### Configure logging

# Configure logging
def setup_logger(notebook_name):
    # Get or create logger
    logger = logging.getLogger(notebook_name)
    logger.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)  # Set to DEBUG for detailed logs

    # Remove any existing handlers to prevent duplicates
    logger.handlers.clear()

    # Prevent propagation to root logger (avoids default handlers)
    logger.propagate = False

    # Create console handler
    console_handler = logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout)
    console_handler.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)

    # Define log format (only the formatted line will appear)
    log_format = logging.Formatter('%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s')
    console_handler.setFormatter(log_format)

    # Add handler to logger
    logger.addHandler(console_handler)
    
    return logger
# Set up logger for this notebook
logger = setup_logger("Flat_Retail_Electricity_Consumption_Detail_Gold")
# Table: flat_retail_electricity_consumption_detail_gold: START
#Set table name
db_tablename="flat_retail_electricity_consumption_detail"

#Create gold flat_retail_electricity_consumption_detail Table
try:
    spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
    spark.sql(f"""
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
    (
        FlatRetailElectricityConsumptionDetailKey STRING,
        DimSiteKey STRING,
        SiteCode STRING,
        SiteName STRING,
        DimEmissionScopeKey STRING,
        EmissionScope STRING,
        DimInvoiceDateKey INT,
        InvoiceDate DATE,
        LocationIdentifier STRING,
        InvoiceNumber STRING,
        SupplyAddress STRING,
        MeterReadingType STRING,
        DimBillingPeriodStartDateKey INT,
        BillingPeriodStartDate DATE,
        DimBillingPeriodEndDateKey INT,
        BillingPeriodEndDate DATE,
        BillingPeriodDays INT,
        ChargeType STRING,
        ElectricityConsumptionMWh DECIMAL(20,2),
        DimMonthlyBillingPeriodKey INT,
        MonthlyBillingPeriodDate DATE,
        MonthlyBillingDays INT,
        AverageDailyUsageKwh DECIMAL(20,2),
        ElectricityConsumptionProRataMWh DECIMAL(20,2),
        CleanEnergySubscription DECIMAL(20,2),
        LocationBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e DECIMAL(20,2),
        MarketBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e DECIMAL(20,2),
        BronzeTableName STRING,
        BronzeHashKey STRING,
        CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
        CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
        CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
        CDCOps INT,
        CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
        HashDiff STRING
    )
    USING delta
    LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
    """)

except Exception as e:
    logger.error(f"Failed to create delta table:  {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}: {str(e)}")
    raise

logger.info(f"Started - Process to extract data for gold.flat_retail_electricity_consumption_detail")

try:   
    # Collect emission factors from reference_data
    df_emission_factors = spark.sql(f"""
                            SELECT  
                                ref.Code AS Code,
                                ref.NumericValue AS NumericValue,
                                ref.ValidFromDate AS ValidFromDate,
                                ref.ValidToDate AS ValidToDate
                            FROM silver.reference_data ref
                            WHERE ref.CDCCurrentFlag = 1 AND ref.Code IN ('EF7', 'EF8')
                        """)
    df_emission_factors.createOrReplaceTempView("emission_factors_temp_view")

    source_sql_df = spark.sql("""     
        WITH PivotedEmissionFactors AS (
        SELECT
            ValidFromDate,
            ValidToDate,
            MAX(CASE WHEN Code = 'EF7' THEN NumericValue END) AS LocationBasedEmissionFactor,
            MAX(CASE WHEN Code = 'EF8' THEN NumericValue END) AS MarketBasedEmissionFactor
        FROM emission_factors_temp_view
        WHERE Code IN ('EF7', 'EF8')
        GROUP BY ValidFromDate, ValidToDate
        )

        SELECT  distinct
                rec.HashKey,
                s.DimSiteKey,
                rec.SiteCode,
                s.SiteName,
                e.DimEmissionScopeKey,
                e.EmissionScopeDescription as EmissionScope,
                date_format(rec.InvoiceDate, 'yyyyMMdd') as DimInvoiceDateKey,
                rec.InvoiceDate,
                rec.LocationIdentifier,
                rec.InvoiceNumber,
                rec.SupplyAddress,
                rec.MeterReadingType,
                date_format(rec.BillingPeriodStartDate, 'yyyyMMdd') as DimBillingPeriodStartDateKey,
                rec.BillingPeriodStartDate,
                date_format(rec.BillingPeriodEndDate, 'yyyyMMdd') as DimBillingPeriodEndDateKey,
                rec.BillingPeriodEndDate,
                rec.BillingPeriodDays,
                rec.ChargeType,
                rec.BillingPeriodQuantityKwh / 1000 AS ElectricityConsumptionMWh,
                d.DateId as DimMonthlyBillingPeriodKey,
                rec.MonthlyBillingPeriod as MonthlyBillingPeriodDate,
                rec.MonthlyBillingDays, 
                rec.AverageDailyUsageKwh,
                rec.MonthlyBillingQuantityKwh / 1000 AS ElectricityConsumptionProRataMWh,
                rec.CleanEnergySubscription, 
                (rec.MonthlyBillingQuantityKwh / 1000) * pf.LocationBasedEmissionFactor AS LocationBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e,
                ((rec.MonthlyBillingQuantityKwh / 1000) * (1 - (rec.CleanEnergySubscription / 100))) * pf.MarketBasedEmissionFactor AS MarketBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e,
                rec.RecordSourceTableName as BronzeTableName,
                rec.RecordSourceHashKey as BronzeHashKey
            FROM silver.retail_electricity_charge_details rec
            JOIN PivotedEmissionFactors pf ON rec.MonthlyBillingPeriod BETWEEN pf.ValidFromDate AND pf.ValidToDate
            JOIN gold.dim_site s ON COALESCE(rec.SiteCode, 'UNK') = s.SiteCode
            JOIN dimtables_gold.dimdate d ON d.Date = rec.MonthlyBillingPeriod
            JOIN gold.dim_emission_scope e ON e.EmissionScopeDescription = 'Scope 2'
            WHERE rec.CDCCurrentFlag = 1
        
    """)

except Exception as e:
    logger.error(f"Error - Process to extract data for gold.flat_retail_electricity_consumption_detail: {str(e)}")
    raise
finally:
    logger.info("Completed - Process to extract data for gold.flat_retail_electricity_consumption_detail")

try:
    # Convert HashDiff columns to STRING
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanDimInvoiceDateKey", col("DimInvoiceDateKey").cast("string"))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanDimBillingPeriodStartDateKey", col("DimBillingPeriodStartDateKey").cast("string"))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanDimBillingPeriodEndDateKey", col("DimBillingPeriodEndDateKey").cast("string"))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanBillingPeriodDays", col("BillingPeriodDays").cast("string"))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanElectricityConsumptionMWh", col("ElectricityConsumptionMWh").cast("string"))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanDimMonthlyBillingPeriodKey", col("DimMonthlyBillingPeriodKey").cast("string"))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanMonthlyBillingDays", col("MonthlyBillingDays").cast("string"))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanAverageDailyUsageKwh", col("AverageDailyUsageKwh").cast("string"))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanElectricityConsumptionProRataMWh", col("ElectricityConsumptionProRataMWh").cast("string"))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanCleanEnergySubscription", col("CleanEnergySubscription").cast("string"))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanLocationBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e", col("LocationBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e").cast("string"))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CleanMarketBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e", col("MarketBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e").cast("string"))

    # Add CDC columns    
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("FlatRetailElectricityConsumptionDetailKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "HashKey", "DimSiteKey", "SiteCode", "CleanDimInvoiceDateKey", "InvoiceDate", "LocationIdentifier", "InvoiceNumber", "MeterReadingType", "ChargeType", "CleanDimMonthlyBillingPeriodKey", "MonthlyBillingPeriodDate", "BronzeTableName"), 256))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "SiteName", "DimEmissionScopeKey", "EmissionScope", "SupplyAddress", "CleanDimBillingPeriodStartDateKey", "BillingPeriodStartDate", "CleanDimBillingPeriodEndDateKey", "BillingPeriodEndDate", "CleanBillingPeriodDays", "CleanElectricityConsumptionMWh", "CleanMonthlyBillingDays", "CleanAverageDailyUsageKwh", "CleanElectricityConsumptionProRataMWh", "CleanCleanEnergySubscription", "CleanLocationBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e", "CleanMarketBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e", "BronzeHashKey"), 256))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Gold_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Gold_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
    source_sql_df = source_sql_df.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))
except Exception as e:
    logger.error(f"Error - Error adding CDC columns to: {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} : {str(e)}")
    raise

# Row count parameters
Gold_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
source_sql_df.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

logger.info(f"Started - Merge operation to update the target table: {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}")
# SCD2 logic
try:
  # Use the merge operation to update the target table
  spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.FlatRetailElectricityConsumptionDetailKey = s.FlatRetailElectricityConsumptionDetailKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Gold_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
        INSERT (DimSiteKey, SiteCode, SiteName, DimEmissionScopeKey, EmissionScope, DimInvoiceDateKey, InvoiceDate, LocationIdentifier, InvoiceNumber, SupplyAddress, MeterReadingType, DimBillingPeriodStartDateKey, BillingPeriodStartDate, DimBillingPeriodEndDateKey, BillingPeriodEndDate, BillingPeriodDays, ChargeType, ElectricityConsumptionMWh, DimMonthlyBillingPeriodKey, MonthlyBillingPeriodDate, MonthlyBillingDays, AverageDailyUsageKwh, ElectricityConsumptionProRataMWh, CleanEnergySubscription, LocationBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e, MarketBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e, BronzeTableName, BronzeHashKey, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, FlatRetailElectricityConsumptionDetailKey, HashDiff)
        VALUES (s.DimSiteKey, s.SiteCode, s.SiteName, s.DimEmissionScopeKey, s.EmissionScope, s.DimInvoiceDateKey, s.InvoiceDate, s.LocationIdentifier, s.InvoiceNumber, s.SupplyAddress, s.MeterReadingType, s.DimBillingPeriodStartDateKey, s.BillingPeriodStartDate, s.DimBillingPeriodEndDateKey, s.BillingPeriodEndDate, s.BillingPeriodDays, s.ChargeType, s.ElectricityConsumptionMWh, s.DimMonthlyBillingPeriodKey, s.MonthlyBillingPeriodDate, s.MonthlyBillingDays, s.AverageDailyUsageKwh, s.ElectricityConsumptionProRataMWh, s.CleanEnergySubscription, s.LocationBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e, s.MarketBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e, s.BronzeTableName, s.BronzeHashKey, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.FlatRetailElectricityConsumptionDetailKey, s.HashDiff)
  """)

  # Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
  spark.sql(f"""
      MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
      USING temp_table s
      ON t.FlatRetailElectricityConsumptionDetailKey = s.FlatRetailElectricityConsumptionDetailKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
      WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
        UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Gold_UpdateEndDate}',
                  t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                  t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
      WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
        INSERT (DimSiteKey, SiteCode, SiteName, DimEmissionScopeKey, EmissionScope, DimInvoiceDateKey, InvoiceDate, LocationIdentifier, InvoiceNumber, SupplyAddress, MeterReadingType, DimBillingPeriodStartDateKey, BillingPeriodStartDate, DimBillingPeriodEndDateKey, BillingPeriodEndDate, BillingPeriodDays, ChargeType, ElectricityConsumptionMWh, DimMonthlyBillingPeriodKey, MonthlyBillingPeriodDate, MonthlyBillingDays, AverageDailyUsageKwh, ElectricityConsumptionProRataMWh, CleanEnergySubscription, LocationBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e, MarketBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e, BronzeTableName, BronzeHashKey, CDCLoadDate, CDCStartDate, CDCEndDate, CDCOps, CDCCurrentFlag, FlatRetailElectricityConsumptionDetailKey, HashDiff)
        VALUES (s.DimSiteKey, s.SiteCode, s.SiteName, s.DimEmissionScopeKey, s.EmissionScope, s.DimInvoiceDateKey, s.InvoiceDate, s.LocationIdentifier, s.InvoiceNumber, s.SupplyAddress, s.MeterReadingType, s.DimBillingPeriodStartDateKey, s.BillingPeriodStartDate, s.DimBillingPeriodEndDateKey, s.BillingPeriodEndDate, s.BillingPeriodDays, s.ChargeType, s.ElectricityConsumptionMWh, s.DimMonthlyBillingPeriodKey, s.MonthlyBillingPeriodDate, s.MonthlyBillingDays, s.AverageDailyUsageKwh, s.ElectricityConsumptionProRataMWh, s.CleanEnergySubscription, s.LocationBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e, s.MarketBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e, s.BronzeTableName, s.BronzeHashKey, s.CDCLoadDate, s.CDCStartDate, s.CDCEndDate, 1, s.CDCCurrentFlag, s.FlatRetailElectricityConsumptionDetailKey, s.HashDiff)
  """)

except Exception as e:
    logger.error(f"Error - Merge operation to update the target table: {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} : {str(e)}")
    raise
finally:
    logger.info(f"Completed - Merge operation to update the target table: {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}")

#Row count parameters
Gold_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Gold_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Gold_Update = Gold_Update_Post - Gold_Update_Pre
Gold_Insert = (Gold_Insert_Post - Gold_Insert_Pre) + Gold_Update
Gold_Delete = Gold_Delete_Post - Gold_Delete_Pre
Gold_ActiveRows = Gold_ActiveRecord_Post 
Gold_TotalRows = Gold_TotalRowCount_Post

log_data = [(lake_db_name,db_tablename,Gold_LoadDate,Gold_Insert,Gold_Update,Gold_Delete,Gold_ActiveRows,Gold_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")

gold_df = spark.sql(f"""
SELECT
	FlatRetailElectricityConsumptionDetailKey,
	DimSiteKey,
	SiteCode,
	SiteName,
	DimEmissionScopeKey,
	EmissionScope,
	DimInvoiceDateKey,
	InvoiceDate,
	LocationIdentifier,
	InvoiceNumber,
	SupplyAddress,
	MeterReadingType,
	DimBillingPeriodStartDateKey,
	BillingPeriodStartDate,
	DimBillingPeriodEndDateKey,
	BillingPeriodEndDate,
	BillingPeriodDays,
	ChargeType,
	ElectricityConsumptionMWh,
	DimMonthlyBillingPeriodKey,
	MonthlyBillingPeriodDate,
	MonthlyBillingDays,
	AverageDailyUsageKwh,
	ElectricityConsumptionProRataMWh,
	CleanEnergySubscription,
	LocationBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e,
	MarketBasedElectricityEmissionsTCO2e,
	BronzeTableName,
	BronzeHashKey,
    CDCLoadDate,
    CDCStartDate,
    CDCEndDate,
    CDCOps,
    CDCCurrentFlag
FROM 
	gold.flat_retail_electricity_consumption_detail
dedicated_sql_table_name = 'FlatRetailElectricityConsumptionDetail'

# Configure and submit the request to write to Synapse Dedicated SQL Pool
(gold_df.write
.option(Constants.SERVER, f"""{SynapseDedicatedServer}""")
.option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, (f"""abfss://temp@{TempFolder}/{dedicated_sql_table_name}_staging"""))
.mode("overwrite")
.synapsesql(f"""{SynapseDedicatedDatabase}.dbo.{dedicated_sql_table_name}"""))
# Table: flat_retail_electricity_consumption_detail_gold: END
#archive_file_path = 'abfss://gold@cqldevdatahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/flat_retail_electricity_consumption_detail/flat_retail_electricity_consumption_detail'
#mssparkutils.fs.rm(archive_file_path, recurse=True)
#spark.sql(f"""DROP TABLE gold.flat_retail_electricity_consumption_detail;""")
